scenario.name: invite-routing-error
scenario.send: INVITE sip:routing-user@ani-sipp.svc.cluster.local SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:routing-caller-[call_number]@[local_ip]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:routing-user@ani-sipp.svc.cluster.local> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: <sip:routing-caller-[call_number]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Max-Forwards: 0 Content-Length: 0
